# backend/routers/downloads.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:01:54Z

## Purpose
INSUR data-downloads router — per-dept downloadable sample data.

Per-dept catalog + file-serving endpoints for sample CSV/JSON/SVG files
generated by scaffold-insur-data-downloads.py.

Composes with global §38 (download events audit-rowed by tenant) +
§41.3 (tenant isolation) + §47.6 (PII redacted at sample boundary) +
§57.6 (canonical envelope) + §64.6 (before/after viz) + §66.

Endpoints:
  GET /api/v1/insur/downloads/{dept}                  — catalog (dataset list + URLs)
  GET /api/v1/insur/downloads/{dept}/{filename}       — serve a specific file
  GET /api/v1/insur/downloads/_global                 — cross-dept inventory

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import re
- from `_` import time
- from `pathlib` import Path
- from `typing` import Any
- from `fastapi` import APIRouter, HTTPException, Request
- from `fastapi.responses` import FileResponse
- from `core.insur_audit` import log_insur_access

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Functions
- `_validate_dept(dept)`: (no docstring)
- `_datasets_for(dept)`: Return the dataset_id list for this dept (3 detailed or 1 generic stub).
- `_file_urls(dept, dataset_id)`: Build the 4-file URL set per dataset.
- `global_inventory(http_request)`: Cross-dept inventory — datasets + file counts.
- `dept_catalog(http_request, dept)`: Per-dept catalog — datasets + per-dataset URL set.
- `serve_file(http_request, dept, filename)`: Serve a specific dataset file. Hardened against path traversal.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- File-extension catalog — keep aligned with scaffolder writes.
- Per-dept dataset_id list — keep aligned with scaffolder's DEPT_DATASETS.
- Locate data/samples/ root — same candidate pattern as monitoring.py.
- Filename regex: dataset_id is lowercase + underscores; extension limited.
- Examples ok:  lead_scoring_sample.csv,  churn_sample.before.svg
